correction_sql:
UPDATE tickets
SET is_duplicate = 1,
    duplicate_of = (SELECT new_value FROM data_quality_cases WHERE case_id = 'DQ-TKT-2026-05-D' AND case_status = 'approved'),
    audit_reason = (SELECT audit_reason FROM data_quality_cases WHERE case_id = 'DQ-TKT-2026-05-D' AND case_status = 'approved'),
    audit_updated_at = (SELECT created_at FROM data_quality_cases WHERE case_id = 'DQ-TKT-2026-05-D' AND case_status = 'approved')
WHERE ticket_id IN ('TKT-DQ-MAY-D-001', 'TKT-DQ-MAY-D-002')
  AND product_id = 'LUMAFORMS'
  AND is_duplicate = 0
  AND duplicate_of IS NULL
  AND EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM data_quality_cases
    WHERE case_id = 'DQ-TKT-2026-05-D'
      AND case_status = 'approved'
      AND case_type = 'ticket_duplicate_correction'
      AND target_table = 'tickets'
  );
